calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Pertotti appeared via zoom for Sieglinde Jeffries (petitioner).

The Court found the evidence sufficient to rebut the Probate Code section 6124 revocation presumption. Counsel confirmed in response to the Court's inquiry that the 2010 lost will was sought to be admitted only because that will validated the decedent's exercise of his testamentary power of appointment. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Testamentary. The lost will dated October 4, 2010 is admitted to probate and Sieglinde Jeffries is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full IAEA authority.y. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 9, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.
